response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The vocal audio perfectly matches the classic lyrics of 'Magia' by Kalafina, performed here by Hololive VTubers.
2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was heavily utilized, with typographical corrections made to standard Japanese kanji (e.g., correcting '手摺られた' to '手折られた' and '葉う' to '叶う'). Manual transcription was used to capture the English dialogue in the comedic intro scene (00:00 - 00:11).
3. Timing & Pacing: Timings were strictly locked to vocal activity, ensuring no subtitles bleed into instrumental sections (such as the lengthy violin/battle sequence from 02:46 to 03:44). Aggressive truncation was applied to ensure clean, instant transitions during overlapping lines.

subtitles.english: Oh, she's just...
It's too strong! Ah!
It's just so cool! Ah!
Aaaaaah!

subtitles.original: いつか君が瞳に灯す愛の光が
subtitles.english: The light of love you'll one day ignite in your eyes...
...(will transcend time)

subtitles.original: 滅び急ぐ世界の夢を 確かに一つ
subtitles.english: ...will surely shatter the dream of a world rushing to its destruction...
...(one by one).
Gulping down your hesitation...
...what is it that you desire?

subtitles.original: こんな欲深い憧れの行方に
subtitles.english: At the end of such a greedy longing...
...is there a fleeting tomorrow?
Like the ancient magic...
...I used to dream of as a child,
with the power to shatter even the darkness...
...I want to see you smile.

subtitles.original: 怯えるこの手の中には
subtitles.english: In these trembling hands...
...lies the courage of a plucked flower.
Only my feelings are all I rely on,

subtitles.original: 光を呼び覚ます 願い
subtitles.english: a wish that awakens the light.

subtitles.original: いつか君も誰かの為に 強い力を
subtitles.english: One day you too, for someone's sake...
...(will desire strong power).

subtitles.original: 愛が胸を捉えた夜に 未知の言葉が
subtitles.english: On the night love captured your heart...
...(unknown words will be born).
If I can go without hesitation...
...it's alright if my heart breaks.

subtitles.original: いつも目の前の悲しみに 立ち向かう為の
subtitles.english: Always, to face the sadness in front of me...
...I want a spell.
You are still a dream-seeing memory,
I am a tomorrow that never sleeps.
To win the miracle of us two meeting...
...I will move forward.

subtitles.original: 怯えるこの手の中には
subtitles.english: In these trembling hands...
...lies the blade of a plucked flower.

subtitles.original: 想いだけが生きる全て
subtitles.english: Only my feelings are all I live for,

subtitles.original: 心に振りかざす 願い
subtitles.english: a wish I brandish in my heart.
When I loved the book of Wonderland...

subtitles.original: 不思議の国の本が好きだった頃
subtitles.english: ...where the trapped sun shone,
I believed in the fairy tale...

subtitles.original: 教えるお伽話を信じた
subtitles.english: ...that told me the wish would surely come true.

subtitles.original: 静かに咲き乱れていた
subtitles.english: Quietly blooming...
...was the ancient magic, gently...
...whispering that the power to change the world...
...is in your hands.

subtitles.original: 終わらない夢を見よう
subtitles.english: Let's dream an endless dream...
...in the time I go with you.

subtitles.original: 想いだけが生きる全て
subtitles.english: Only my feelings are all I live for,

subtitles.original: 命を作るのは 願い
subtitles.english: it is my wish that creates life.
